settings.tagline: Their name. Your choice. Made to order.
settings.material_body: Every personalised PAWD collar is made to order. We engrave the name plate after you place your order — so allow 2–3 extra days. The wait is worth it. This is the collar they'll wear for years.
settings.pers_hint: Engraved in metal. Max 12 characters. Allow 2–3 extra business days.
settings.pers_note: Personalised items are final sale (unless faulty).

settings.title: Engraving Details
settings.value_2: Serif caps on solid metal plate
settings.value_4: Personalised items are final sale (unless faulty)

settings.title: Neck Size Guide
settings.hint: Measure neck, add 2cm. When between sizes, go up.
settings.table_html:
SizeNeckFits
XS20–28cmChihuahua, tiny breeds, small cats
S28–36cmMaltese, Shih Tzu
M36–44cmCavoodle, French Bulldog
L44–52cmLabrador, Spaniel
XL52–60cmGerman Shepherd, large breeds

settings.title: Engraving & Lead Time
settings.content:
Your pet's name is engraved on a metal plate, riveted to the collar after your order is placed. Allow 2–3 additional business days before dispatch.

Personalised items cannot be returned unless faulty. Please double-check your name spelling before ordering.

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Care Instructions
settings.content: Spot clean with damp cloth. Do not machine wash. Store flat to preserve bow tie shape.

settings.name: Made to Order
settings.description: Each collar is personalised after your order is placed. No two are the same. Allow 2–3 extra business days.

settings.name: 12 Characters
settings.description: Name, nickname, or short phrase. Engraved in clean serif caps on a solid metal name plate.

settings.name: Multiple Colourways
settings.description: From Taupe to Ivory to Dusty Rose. Each designed to photograph beautifully against any coat colour.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
